title: Source Payload Install Sync Proof
goal: Resolve #411 by making source, packaged payload, and installed root surface synchronization provable with compact classified output.
non_goals: Do not collapse source, payload, and root install layers.
Do not treat intentional root customization as drift.

intent.outcome: Maintainers can prove source/payload/root-install synchronization and see intentional differences without broad manual inspection.
intent.constraints: Prefer maintainer-surface checks over new prose; keep package boundaries explicit.
intent.latitude: Extend the existing boundary checker and tests with a compact proof section.
intent.escalation: Escalate before changing installer ownership, package layout, or upgrade semantics.

execution.next_step: Archive #411 and validate the parent architecture-boundary lane.
execution.proof: Run source/payload checker tests, the checker in JSON/text modes, maintainer surfaces, proof selector, summary, reconcile, and doctor.

invariants: Planning and memory packages keep independent payload contracts and CLI entry points.
Root operational installs remain dogfooding surfaces, not package-local source truth.
Intentional root differences are classified separately from drift warnings.

intent_continuity.larger intended outcome: Strengthen architecture boundaries after contract and generated-layer expansion.
intent_continuity.this slice completes the larger intended: yes if the parent architecture-boundary lane validates after #411

required_continuation.activation trigger: After #411 closes, validate and close the parent architecture-boundary lane if all child acceptance is satisfied.

iterative_follow_through.what this slice enabled: `check_source_payload_operational_install.py --format json` now emits `sync_proof` for planning and memory, including owners, refresh rules, source-to-payload inventory, packaging manifest coverage, root install sentinels, intentional differences, and package-local install guard status.
iterative_follow_through.discovered implications: The checker initially treated untracked bytecode and intentional source-only/package-computed files as payload drift; the implementation now ignores bytecode and classifies intentional extras instead of suppressing them.
iterative_follow_through.validation still needed: none for #411; parent architecture-boundary lane needs final validation.

intent_interpretation.literal request: Ingest and implement all issues lane by lane. Commit and push after each milestone. Collect dogfooding evidence.
intent_interpretation.inferred intended outcome: Continue the architecture-boundary lane by landing #411 with checked-in proof and continuation evidence.
intent_interpretation.chosen concrete what: Extend the source/payload/root-install checker to emit a classified proof surface and enforce it with tests.
intent_interpretation.review guidance: Confirm the check proves planning and memory payload/root sync and classifies intentional differences separately from drift.

execution_bounds.allowed paths: source/payload boundary checker, focused tests, compact compatibility guide if needed, planning evidence surfaces
execution_bounds.required validation commands: focused source/payload tests, boundary checker strict JSON/text, maintainer-surfaces, proof selector, summary, reconcile, doctor
execution_bounds.ask-before-refactor threshold: Any package installer layout or payload ownership change.
execution_bounds.stop before touching: Package payload contents or generated surfaces unless a check proves they are stale.

context_budget.live working set: issue #411, source/payload checker, source/payload tests, maintainer-surface command
context_budget.recoverable later: GitHub issue #411 body and parent architecture-boundary lane
context_budget.externalize before shift: Keep this plan updated with proof and closeout state.
context_budget.tiny resumability note: Active #411: add classified sync proof for source/payload/root-install boundary.
context_budget.context-shift triggers: Need to change installer payload semantics or package layout.

delegated_judgment.requested outcome: Make synchronization proof visible and classified.
delegated_judgment.hard constraints: No package collapse, no payload removal, and no treating intentional root customization as drift.
delegated_judgment.agent may decide locally: The exact proof payload shape and compatibility guide wording.
delegated_judgment.escalate when: The fix requires installer layout changes or changes what payload files are managed.

active_milestone.scope: Checker proof output plus focused tests.

immediate_next_action: Extend the source/payload/root-install checker with classified sync proof.
invariants: Planning and memory packages keep independent payload contracts and CLI entry points.
Root operational installs remain dogfooding surfaces, not package-local source truth.
Intentional root differences are classified separately from drift warnings.
validation_commands: uv run agentic-workspace doctor --target . --modules planning --format json
completion_criteria: Maintainers can prove source/payload/root sync without broad manual inspection.
Intentional differences are classified rather than appearing as drift.
Package-local installed-surface mistakes are caught or clearly warned.

execution_run.handoff source: uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json; gh issue view 411 --json number,title,body,state,labels,url,comments
execution_run.what happened: Extended the existing source/payload/root-install checker with classified sync proof for planning and memory, added focused tests, and restored the compact maintainer guide path referenced by package adapters.
execution_run.scope touched: boundary checker, focused source/payload tests, compatibility guide, and planning evidence surfaces
execution_run.validations run: uv run pytest tests/test_source_payload_operational_install.py -q; uv run python scripts/check/check_source_payload_operational_install.py --format json --strict; uv run python scripts/check/check_source_payload_operational_install.py --quiet-success; make maintainer-surfaces; uv run agentic-workspace proof --target . --changed ... --format json; uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q; uv run ruff check src tests scripts; uv run agentic-workspace summary --format json
execution_run.result for continuation: #411 is satisfied; parent architecture-boundary validation is the next milestone.
execution_run.next step: Archive #411, commit and push, close the GitHub issue, then validate the parent architecture-boundary lane.

finished_run_review.scope respected: yes; no installer layout or payload ownership semantics changed
finished_run_review.intent served: yes for #411; parent architecture-boundary lane remains for final validation
finished_run_review.config compliance: used package summary/proof and maintainer-surface checks; no broad manual inspection substituted for proof
finished_run_review.misinterpretation risk: low; intentional differences are explicitly classified in sync_proof
finished_run_review.follow-on decision: validate and close the parent architecture-boundary lane if acceptance is satisfied.

proof_report.validation proof: Focused checker tests pass; strict JSON checker reports warning_count 0 and sync_proof status current; maintainer-surfaces passes; proof selected workspace_cli, maintainer_surfaces, and planning_surfaces; workspace CLI tests and ruff pass.
proof_report.evidence for \"proof achieved\" state: `uv run pytest tests/test_source_payload_operational_install.py -q` passed 6 tests; `uv run python scripts/check/check_source_payload_operational_install.py --format json --strict` returned warning_count 0 with current sync_proof; `make maintainer-surfaces` passed; `uv run pytest tests/test_workspace_cli.py -q` passed 177 tests; `uv run ruff check src tests scripts` passed.

intent_satisfaction.original intent: Ingest and implement all issues lane by lane. Commit and push after each milestone. Collect dogfooding evidence.
intent_satisfaction.evidence of intent satisfaction: #411 landed classified source/payload/root sync proof in the existing checker; parent architecture-boundary validation remains.

system_intent_alignment.relevant system intent: Keep source, packaged payload, and installed root surfaces distinguishable and cheaply provable.
system_intent_alignment.slice shaping bias: Improve a maintainer check instead of adding another durable first-line surface.
system_intent_alignment.broader-lane validation question: Can the parent architecture-boundary lane close after #411 without relying on manual inspection?

closure_check.why this decision is honest: #411 acceptance is satisfied, but the parent architecture-boundary lane remains open for validation.
closure_check.evidence carried forward: sync_proof current output; focused checker tests; strict checker; maintainer-surfaces; proof selector; workspace tests; ruff.
closure_check.reopen trigger: Reopen #411 if compact sync proof cannot prove source/payload/root alignment, intentional differences are unclassified, or package-local installs are not warned.

drift_log: 2026-04-27: Promoted #411 after #410 closeout because package summary surfaced the unsatisfied continuation.
2026-04-27: Dogfooding checker initially counted untracked bytecode and intentional package-source extras as drift; fixed by ignoring bytecode and classifying intentional extras.
